chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1593 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.9937/2017 (Stay App) 2. For hearing of main case 19.12.2023 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Abdul Rasheed Kalwar, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Despite a last chance was given to advocates so many times to proceed with the matter, learned Counsel for the petitioners has chosen to remain absent today. Learned Counsel, who is holding brief on his behalf, has refused to argue this matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
